scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.start: npm run build --prefix client && npx concurrently "npm run start --prefix server" "npx vite preview client --port 3000 --host 127.0.0.1"
scripts.test: node server/testEmissions.js && node server/testLocations.js && node server/testAgent.js && node server/testIntegration.js
